attacking_style: Emerging breakaway specialist who targets stages with late categorized climbs. Capable of holding off reduced peloton charges in final kilometers when positioning and timing favor escapees.
team_tactics: Insufficient data across multiple races to establish clear team tactical patterns.
terrain_preference: Reduced-bunch stages featuring late categorized climbs that fragment the peloton but don't eliminate breakaway possibilities. Benefits when selective terrain creates tactical uncertainty in the chase.
vulnerability: Unknown - single observation insufficient to identify weaknesses. Likely vulnerable in pure sprint finishes or when peloton commits full resources to organized chase.
key_patterns: Insufficient repeat observations: only 1 race documented, cannot establish patterns requiring multiple confirmations.
form_trajectory: positive: First professional victory at age 23 indicates upward development trajectory and growing confidence in breakaway situations
